narrative:
Muskingum County has 52,886 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.3% of registrants.
